name: T8 LED Integrated Tube Light – Clear/Strip Lens – 2/3/4/5/6/8Ft Selectable
description: T8 LED Integrated Tube Light available in 2FT, 3FT, 4FT, 5FT, 6FT, and 8FT lengths, Our T8 LED Integrated Tube Lights offer a versatile lighting solution for both commercial and residential spaces. Choose between a clear or strip lens to suit your preferred light diffusion. These lights feature a built-in LED driver, eliminating the need for an external ballast, and are designed for easy, plug-and-play installation. With high brightness, energy efficiency, and a durable aluminum + PC housing, they’re ideal for garages, workshops, warehouses, retail stores, and offices.
short_desc: Specifications: Lens Options: Clear or Strip lens for different light diffusion preferences Available Sizes: 2FT, 3FT, 4FT, 5FT, 6FT, 8FT – suitable for various space requirements High Brightness & Efficiency: Designed to deliver strong, energy-efficient illumination Durable Construction: Made with high-quality aluminum and PC for long-lasting performance Wide Application: Ideal for garages, workshops, retail spaces, warehouses, and offices Plug & Play: Integrated design allows for simple mounting and wiring
